t.t: Request products and create a quotation opportunity
View submitted requisitions and requested products

div.class: alert alert-danger d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-4
alert alert-success d-flex align-items-center gap-2 mb-4

input.name: employee_code
input.t-att-value: form_values.get('employee_code') or (partner and (partner.ref or partner.id)) or ''

div.t-attf-class: alert mb-0 py-2 o_req_otp_status #{'alert-success' if otp_verified else 'alert-info'}
div.t: Email verified. Product details are active.
Signed in. Product details are active.
Verify your email with OTP to activate product details.

div.div: Upload goods or services from an Excel/CSV file.

div.class: d-flex flex-wrap align-items-center justify-content-between gap-2 mb-3

div.span: No product requisitions have been submitted yet.

div.class: accordion-item mb-3 border rounded shadow-sm overflow-hidden

span.class: d-flex flex-column flex-md-row align-items-md-center gap-md-4 w-100 pe-3

div.p: Your request has been received and a CRM lead has been created.
Our team will review the details and get back to you shortly.
